chapter_title.en: Reward of reciting Surah Talaq and Tahrim

text: : مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الطَّلَاقِ وَ التَّحْرِیمِ فِی فَرِیضَهٍ أَعَاذَهُ اللَّهُ مِنْ أَنْ یَکُونَ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ مِمَّنْ یَخَافُ أَوْ یَحْزَنُ وَ عُوفِیَ مِنَ النَّارِ وَ أَدْخَلَهُ اللَّهُ الْجَنَّهَ بِتِلَاوَتِهِ إِیَّاهُمَا وَ مُحَافَظَتِهِ عَلَیْهِمَا لِأَنَّهُمَا لِلنَّبِیِّ ص.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan b. Ali from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Talaq and Tahrim in his obligatory prayers the Almighty Allah would protect him from the fear of the Day of Judgment and save him from Hell. He would enter Paradise due to recitation of these Surahs for they are related to the Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.).”
